name: Hot Chili Limited
analysis: HCH has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.8740. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.9009 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.8740, stop A$1.5840, target A$1.9150. Risk/reward is 0.14:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
